titleStmt.title: SII 18.415: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 415. (B.K. No. 15 of 1934-35.) CHALGĒRI, RANEBENNUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab lying in the threshing floor of Vālīkār Basappa.

summary.p: This inscription is dated in Śaka 1339, Hēmaḷambi, Vaiśākha śu. 1, Monday, corresponding to A.D. 1417, April 18. The week-day was Sunday and not Monday as stated in the record.

It states that when Chavuḍaya, son of Kōṭeya-Nāyaka, died (probably in a fight for the settlement of the boundary ?) of Mudiyanūr and Tiraḷigeṟe, Hampaṇṇa-Oḍeya, son of Maṁgappa-Oḍeya, ordered that a grant of land be made to the family of the deceased. The grant was made at the request of Buḷarasa and others. Buḷḷarasa was the adhikāri of Hariharadēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti śrī jayādbhudaya śakavaruṣa 1339 neyā
hēmaḷaṁbisavaṁtsarada vayiśākha su 1 sō
mavāradalu śrīmatu hariharadēvara Ādhi
kāri buḷḷarsarū mahājanaṁgaḷū tiraḷigeṟe
ya Adhikāri gauḍu prajegaḷū ṟaṭṭaha
ḷiya nāḍagauḍugaḷū ca[U]ḍagāvuṁ kuḷi
tu mudiyanūra tiraḷigeṟeya sīmeya saṁ
vijavanū tidūtiralu keḷage yeraḍu taḷa bi
ṭṭiya māḍidalli kōṭeyanāykana maga cavuḍayanū ma
hājanaṁgaḷa buḷḷarpa Āūra prajegaḷa kāla baḷiya
lu sattalli Avarellaru maṁgappaOḍeyara maga haṁ
paṁṇaOḍeyarige hēḷidalli Avaṭhu ta(ṁ)mma Adhikā
ri bāyināyka Ā prajegaḷa muṁde koḍahēḷi koṭṭa mā(ṁ)
nya Ā cavuḍayana heṁḍiru makkaḷu Ātana taṁma kē
tayage koṭṭa yereya keyi bījavari hiriya
01: Okkuḷa yī koḍagiyanū Ārobbaru tappidava
ru vāraṇasiyalu brāṁhmara kapileya koṁda
dōṣake hōharu maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī śrī
śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 18.415 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
